title: 有没有可能，等我们下一代长大了，他们要一个什么功能随手就让 AI 做了？

content.summary: 有没有可能，等我们下一代长大了，他们要一个什么功能随手就让 AI 做了？ Logan Kilpatrick (@OfficialLoganK) With AI coding, it’s possible every app / website becomes an App Store. The second and third order effects of this are interesting to think about. — https://nitter.net/OfficialLoganK/status/2035855117904216333#m
